/* ---- Types ---- */ /* ---- Parser ---- */export class BlackjackStateParser{constructor(){this._data=null;}flush(){this._data=null;return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;try{// 1) state
const state=wrapper.readString();// 2) dealerReveal
const dealerReveal=wrapper.readBoolean();// 3) dealerCards
const dealerCount=wrapper.readInt();const dealerCards=[];for(let i=0;i<dealerCount;i++)dealerCards.push(wrapper.readString());// 4) dealerTotal
const dealerTotal=wrapper.readInt();// 5) playerHand
const playerCount=wrapper.readInt();const playerHand=[];for(let i=0;i<playerCount;i++)playerHand.push(wrapper.readString());// 6) playerTotal
const playerTotal=wrapper.readInt();// 7) playerTurn
const playerTurn=wrapper.readBoolean();// 8) canDouble
const canDouble=wrapper.readBoolean();// 9) canSplit
const canSplit=wrapper.readBoolean();// 10) insuranceOffered
const insuranceOffered=wrapper.readBoolean();// 11) bet
const bet=wrapper.readInt();// 12) messages
const msgCount=wrapper.readInt();const messages=[];for(let i=0;i<msgCount;i++){const text=wrapper.readString();const level=wrapper.readString();messages.push({text,level});}this._data={state,dealerReveal,dealerCards,dealerTotal,playerHand,playerTotal,playerTurn,canDouble,canSplit,insuranceOffered,bet,messages};return true;}catch(err){console.error('[BlackjackStateParser] failed:',err);this._data=null;return false;}}get data(){return this._data;}}
